## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::HouseHeart;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        HouseHeart { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
home sweet home, abode, building, residence, healthy living, lifestyle

home, buildings, medical
